value.body:
## Summary

Upgrade `electron` in `@cycle/desktop` from 42.3.3 to 42.4.1.

## Affected manifest

- `packages/desktop/package.json`

## Rationale

`pnpm outdated --recursive --format json` reports a newer Electron 42.x release. This is worth taking, but desktop runtime upgrades need smoke testing because they can affect BrowserWindow, preload, IPC, filesystem access, and platform behavior.

## Verification

- Run `pnpm --filter @cycle/desktop build`.
- Run `pnpm --filter @cycle/desktop typecheck`.
- Launch the desktop app and smoke test onboarding, repository selection, issue list/detail navigation, in-app Codex chat, and app restart behavior.
value.title: Upgrade Electron to 42.4.1
